assertions.title: Supplier management CRUD with payment terms, GST, payable account and secure bank details

steps.action: Verify supplier API surface and transition endpoints
steps.observed: SupplierController exposes GET(list/detail), POST(create), PUT(update), POST approve/activate/suspend endpoints

steps.expected: Supplier workflows and controller contracts pass

steps.action: Verify implementation-level security and data handling
steps.expected: Payable account auto-created, GST/payment terms persisted, bank details encrypted/decrypted
steps.observed: SupplierService creates payable account under AP control, normalizes GST/state/payment terms, encrypts bank fields on write and decrypts in response

evidence.observedOutput: Supplier-related targeted suites succeeded with BUILD SUCCESS (14 tests, 0 failures).
evidence.network: Direct runtime API checks unavailable (localhost app down); validated via controller/service + tests

assertions.title: Goods receipt validates PO quantities, updates inventory, and links accounting

steps.action: Run GRN and purchase linkage tests
steps.expected: GRN idempotency/validation and purchase journal linkage pass
GRN requires open period and only receivable PO states
steps.observed: GoodsReceiptService requires accountingPeriodService.requireOpenPeriod and rejects non-APPROVED/PARTIALLY_RECEIVED POs

steps.expected: Receipt records inventory batch movement and purchase invoice path links journal + status progression
steps.observed: GoodsReceiptService records receipt via rawMaterialService.recordReceipt; PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest confirms FULLY_RECEIVED->INVOICED->CLOSED transitions

evidence.observedOutput: All targeted GRN/invoice-linkage suites passed with BUILD SUCCESS and zero failures.
evidence.network: Live app unavailable; validated via focused tests and source-backed API flow evidence

assertions.title: Frontend handoff documentation for purchasing module completeness

steps.action: Inspect purchasing section in frontend handoff
steps.expected: Documentation includes endpoint map, lifecycle state machine, user flows, error codes, and DTO contracts
steps.observed: Section includes supplier + PO + GRN + invoice/return endpoints, detailed user flows, state machines, error-code table, and DTO contracts

steps.expected: Documented transitions match current PO workflow endpoints and statuses
steps.observed: Documented DRAFT/APPROVE/VOID/CLOSE endpoints and transition graph align with PurchaseOrderService + PurchasingWorkflowController

evidence.observedOutput: Handoff section is populated and specific; not placeholder text. Includes lifecycle timeline endpoint and transition constraints.
evidence.network: Documentation verification does not require live runtime

frictions.description: Task-based subagent execution unavailable due invalid configured model alias.
frictions.resolution: Primary validator executed equivalent checks directly and produced grouped report.

frictions.description: Live app endpoint was unavailable; docker db bind conflict on 5432 prevented full compose app startup.
frictions.resolution: Used test-surface fallback (targeted Maven tests + source contract checks) as specified in user-testing guidance.

summary: Validated supplier management, GRN/inventory/accounting linkage, and purchasing frontend handoff documentation. All assigned assertions (VAL-PURCH-002, VAL-PURCH-004, VAL-DOC-006) passed with targeted tests and implementation/documentation evidence.
